items_flat.title_en: OpenAI starts rolling out GPT-Live voice models
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI 開始推出 GPT-Live 語音模型
items_flat.summary_en: GPT-Live introduced a new full-duplex voice experience in ChatGPT, emphasizing more natural turn-taking and audio interaction.
items_flat.summary_zh: GPT-Live 為 ChatGPT 帶來新一代全雙工語音體驗，強調更自然的輪流對話與音訊互動。

items_flat.title_en: OpenAI confirms public launch timing for GPT-5.6
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI 確認 GPT-5.6 公開推出時程
items_flat.summary_en: OpenAI said Sol, Terra, and Luna would launch publicly the next day as a three-tier family spanning frontier, balanced, and efficient use cases.
items_flat.summary_zh: OpenAI 表示 Sol、Terra、Luna 將於隔日公開推出，三層產品線分別涵蓋前沿、均衡與高效率用途。
